title: Arirang World Tour Latin America Weverse Presale Registration Closes — April 7 ARMY Presale Next
detail: The official ARMY Membership (Global) Weverse registration deadline for the Arirang World Tour Latin America presale closes on April 2, 2026 at 12PM PT / 3PM ET. Fans who registered by the deadline are eligible for the ARMY member presale beginning April 7. Registration allowed selection of up to 3 Latin American cities. Public ticket sales open April 10. The Latin America leg includes dates across Brazil, Argentina, Mexico, Colombia, Chile, and Peru — the most extensive Latin American tour dates in BTS history.
